## Testing Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes (svelte-kit sync + svelte-check)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (vitest unit)
- [ ] `pnpm exec playwright test --list` parses all specs
- [ ] `pnpm run build` succeeds locally (with placeholder envs if needed)
- [ ] Manual smoke test of affected routes (or N/A)
- [ ] New/changed tests added where appropriate
- [ ] No `tailwind.config.js` introduced — Tailwind v4 stays CSS-first
- [ ] No emoji in code or docs
- [ ] Conventional commit PR title (feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor/test/perf/ci/style)
